creator: bob@immure.com
text:
On Tue, Dec 19, 2006 at 09:30:39PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/tkmerge,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/106933 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106933

There is a one line fix that I would like to also include in this
update. This would be version 0.85. Assuming that's ok, what would
be the best way to proceed (I will create the ver 0.85 tarball
shortly...should be done later this evening or early tomorrow)?

Bob

> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

-- 
Bob Willcox                       Possessions increase to fill the space
bob@immure.com                    available for their storage.
Austin, TX                               -- Ryan
